results.title: SOP celebrates Gawai with first-ever bowling-themed Family Day
results.description: MIRI: Sarawak Oil Palms (SOP) marked this year’s Gawai celebration with a fresh twist, bringing together employees for its first bowling themed ‘Kasi Jadi Gawai’ Family Day at Megalanes East, Bintang Megamall. The annual celebration, which drew staff from the company’s various headquarters in Miri, aimed to strengthen workplace bonds while celebrating Sarawak’s rich cultural [...]

results.title: Suniel Shetty Defends Ranveer Singh Amid Don 3 Row: Who Are You To Ban? | EXCLUSIVE
results.description: Suniel Shetty has come out in support of Ranveer Singh amid the Don 3 controversy, saying no one has the right to ban an actor or art. He urged Farhan Akhtar and Ranveer to resolve the issue through face to face conversation.

results.title: India’s first-ever hydrogen train nears launch; Key safety trial conducted in Haryana
results.description: The development marks another step towards the launch of Indian Railways’ hydrogen fuel-cell-based train project on the Jind-Sonipat section of Northern Railway.

results.title: UAE weather: Fair to partly cloudy conditions, fog chance and rougher seas expected
results.description: UAE weekend forecast: fair to partly cloudy skies, rising humidity, fog risk over coastal and inland areas, and rougher seas expected in the Arabian Gulf.
